AND MARIA KHAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-458843, CGC-07-459753, CGC-07-460355, CGC-07-470189 WITH CASE CGC-06-453564 IS GRANTED FOR ALL PURPOSES. 453564 IS THE LEAD CASE. THE DOMINANT ISSUE OF DAMAGE CAUSED BY THE RAIN IS COMMON TO ALL OF THE CASES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. THE COURT NOTED THAT THIS CASE WOULD BENEFIT FROM A SINGLE ASSIGNMENT TO A JUDICIAL OFFICER. COUNSEL WERE INSTRUCTED TO EITHER AGREE ON A JUDICIAL OFFICER, OR LIST THEIR SUGGESTIONS AND SUBMIT THE REQUEST TO THE PRESIDING JUDGE FOR REVIEW. *** AFTER THE HEARING, MS. SOMMER WAS NOTIFIED THAT THE REQUEST FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT IS TO BE DIRECTED TO DEPARTMENT 302 AND IT WILL THEN BE FORWARDED TO THE PRESIDING JUDGE. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-458843, CGC-07-459753, CGC-07-460355, CGC-07-470189 WITH CASE CGC-06-453564
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Trent Thornley (437.9100) for plaintiff and responding party Evelyn Granados
Nancy Conway (241.1140) for plaintiffs and responding parties Judith Aspin, Joan Eahr, Malik Watson, Kerrin Rourke and Cristina Moreno
Jennifer Sommer (925.256.0677) for defendants and moving parties
Russell Rowen of Lerner & Vest (781.4000) for defendant Maria Khan, trustee

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS AMERICAN REALTY & CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND MARIA KHAN'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-458843, CGC-07-459753, CGC-07-460355, CGC-07-470189 WITH CASE CGC-06-453564 is granted for all purposes. 453564 is the lead case. The dominant issue of damage caused by the rain is common to all of the cases. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. The Court noted that this case would benefit from a single assignment to a judicial officer. Counsel were instructed to either agree on a judicial officer, or list their suggestions and submit the request to the presiding judge for review. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

*** After the hearing, Ms. Sommer was notified that the request for single assignment is to be directed to Department 302 and it will then be forwarded to the presiding judge. She was instructed to notify counsel. ***
